source: USDA NASS Quick Stats — Grain Stocks (capacity, first of Dec) + Crop Production annual
note: Grain = corn+soybeans+wheat+sorghum+barley+oats, final YEAR figures only (forecast rows excluded). Capacity is on-farm + off-farm, first-of-December. 'OT' combined-small-states rows are in the national total but never ranked. Ratio over 1.0 = the state grew more grain than it can store.
